title: Crunchy Sour Ukrainian Oats Bowl
description: A cozy Ukrainian breakfast bowl with tangy sour cream, crunchy sunflower seeds, and protein-packed oats.
instructions: In a medium saucepan bring 2 cups of water or buttermilk to a boil, then add the rolled oats.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5–7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oats absorb the liquid and reach a creamy consistency.
Meanwhile, toast the sunflower seeds in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2 minutes until golden and fragrant, then set aside.
Spread the roasted chickpeas on a baking sheet and roast in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes, stirring once, until crisp.
Once the oats are cooked, remove from heat and stir in the softened sour cream, maple syrup, chopped dill, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Transfer the oat mixture to a serving bowl, then top with the toasted sunflower seeds, roasted chickpeas, and optional smoked salmon slices.
If desired, drizzle a little extra maple syrup over the top for added sweetness.
Serve hot for a comforting, protein-rich start to your day.
Enjoy the delightful crunch and tangy flavors!
